summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by modifying the Navigation component to detect when the current route is '/' and wrap the sticky nav in a div with 'pt-48' (approximately 192px / ~2 inches) top padding. This change is scoped only to the home/Health Network landing page. No files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/ were modified. The navigation bar's content, links, and interactive behavior are unchanged.
